errors.network: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: We could not find what you were looking for.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
errors.unexpected: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.linkInvalidOrExpired: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

states.emptyMessage: There is no content to show right now.
states.offlineMessage: Reconnect to load the latest data.
states.permissionMessage: Grant the required permission to use this feature.

welcome.title: Welcome to Ultimate Natives
welcome.subtitle: Manage practices, attendance, and player performance for your team.

auth.validationPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.forgotPasswordIntro: Enter your account email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccessMessage: If an account exists for that email, we have sent a link to reset your password.
auth.resetPasswordIntro: Create a strong password for your account.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessMessage: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.
auth.linkInvalidMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.
auth.validationPasswordWeak: Use at least 12 characters with upper- and lower-case letters and a number.
auth.acceptInvitationIntro: {{inviter}} invited you to join {{team}}. Set a password to activate your account.
auth.invitationInvalidMessage: This invitation is invalid, has expired, or was already used. Ask an administrator to send a new one.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.intro: These devices are currently signed in to your account.
sessions.revokeFailedToast: We could not sign out that device. Please try again.
sessions.emptyMessage: You are only signed in on this device.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist.

admin.title: Admin
admin.heading: Admin console
admin.description: Manage users, roles, and team settings. Only members with the manage-users permission can open this area.

guard.forbiddenMessage: This area needs a permission your account has not been granted.
guard.onboardingMessage: Complete onboarding to continue to this area.
guard.accountBlockedMessage: Your account is not active. Contact an administrator for help.
guard.teamRequiredMessage: This area needs an active team and season. Ask an administrator to add you to a team.
